audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. GasLimitCapTxValidator enforces tx.GasLimit <= Eip7825Constants.DefaultTxGasLimitCap (16,777,216) when IsEip7825Enabled=true. Validator is applied at all entry points: TxPool submission (via MalformedTxFilter), pool re-validation (via HeadTxValidator), and block validation (via BlockValidator.ValidateTransactions).
